SEARCH
Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Class AbstractElement<T extends AbstractElement<T>>

java.lang.Object
net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.AbstractElement<T>
Type Parameters:
T - An abstract element
All Implemented Interfaces:
Element
Direct Known Subclasses:
Rect
public abstract class AbstractElement<T extends AbstractElement<T>> extends Keyed implements Element
Represents a base keyed element to be displayed on a Screen.

    • AbstractElement

      protected AbstractElement(@NotNull @NotNull Key key, @Nullable @Nullable Point pos, @Nullable @Nullable Point anchor, @Nullable @Nullable Point offset)
      Create a new keyed element.
      Parameters:
      key - Unique identifier for element
      pos - Position of element
      anchor - Anchor for element
      offset - Offset of element

      Set this element's position from the anchor point.

    • getAnchor

      @Nullable public @Nullable Point getAnchor()
      Description copied from interface: Element
      Get this element's anchor point on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      Specified by:
      getAnchor in interface Element
      Returns:
      Anchor point
